what_it_does: Browser-oriented talking head / TTS runtime related to morph targets and speech-driven animation.
succinct_summary: Potential lightweight web path for a realtime Morgan head if GLB/morph-target assets are available.
possible_use: Study web runtime architecture, viseme handling, and audio-driven head animation for Morgan live demos.
important_notes: Requires compatible avatar assets and browser performance testing; separate from high-realism diffusion portrait generation. README hint:   HeadTTS
